user.title: Set up VAG Connect
user.description: Connect your vehicle to Home Assistant. Choose your brand and enter your app credentials.

data_description.spin: Required for actions like door locking. Can be left empty.
data_description.scan_interval: Minimum 5 minutes — too frequent polling may cause account suspension.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please check your credentials.
error.missing_library: CarConnectivity library not found. Please restart Home Assistant.
error.terms_and_conditions: Terms and conditions need to be accepted. Open the app and sign in there.
error.marketing_consent: New privacy consent required in app: Profile → Consents.
error.two_factor_required: 2FA required. Sign in manually in the app once and confirm the code.
error.too_many_requests: Account temporarily blocked (too many requests). Wait 15 minutes.

two_factor_required.title: 2FA confirmation required — {brand}
two_factor_required.description:
Your {brand} account ({username}) requires two-factor authentication.

**One-time workaround:**
1. Open the **{brand} app** on your phone
2. Sign in manually once
3. Confirm the 2FA code sent via email
4. Restart Home Assistant

Tokens will be stored locally after this — no re-auth needed.

terms_and_conditions.title: Accept terms and conditions — {brand}
terms_and_conditions.description:
New terms and conditions for {brand} ({username}) need to be accepted.

1. Open the **{brand} app**
2. Sign in and accept the terms
3. Restart the integration

marketing_consent.title: Consent required — {brand}
marketing_consent.description:
New privacy consent for {brand} ({username}) required.

App → Profile → Consents → confirm → restart HA.

too_many_requests.title: Account temporarily blocked — {brand}
too_many_requests.description:
{brand} account ({username}) is temporarily blocked (too many requests).

Please **wait 15 minutes** and restart Home Assistant.
Increase the poll interval to at least 15 minutes.

auth_failed.title: Authentication failed — {brand}
auth_failed.description:
Connection to {brand} ({username}) failed.

Please check credentials under Settings → Devices & Services → VAG Connect → ⋮ → Reconfigure.
